failures.description: The agent called ProductCatalogSearch with an invalid payload instead of supplying the required string product_id and item_id for item 1151293680 of the Mechanical Keyboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At the failing step, the agent attempted a concrete tool call to ProductCatalogSearch with arguments {"product_id": 0}. The tool/runtime explicitly returned a SchemaError: catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id. This is a malformed invocation: product_id has the wrong type/value and item_id is missing. The error is not connectivity, access, or guardrail related.
